title: Manufacturing Engineer - Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd!
